turns.question: Hey, are you doing okay? You look pretty tired today.
turns.questionKo: 저기, 괜찮아? 오늘 되게 피곤해 보인다.
turns.answer: Honestly, not really -- I stayed up way too late last night.
turns.answerKo: 솔직히 별로야, 어젯밤에 너무 늦게까지 안 잤어.

turns.question: Ah, that'll do it. Want me to grab you a coffee before the meeting?
turns.questionKo: 아, 그래서 그렇구나. 회의 전에 커피 한 잔 갖다줄까?
turns.answer: That would be amazing, thank you.

turns.question: No problem. So how's the new job treating you, by the way?
turns.questionKo: 그럼 그럼. 근데 새 직장은 어때?
turns.answer: It's actually going really well -- way better than my last one.
turns.answerKo: 사실 진짜 괜찮아, 예전 직장보다 훨씬 나아.

turns.question: That's great to hear! What's the biggest difference?
turns.answer: My manager actually listens when I bring up ideas, which is new for me.
turns.answerKo: 매니저가 내가 의견 내면 진짜 들어줘, 나한텐 새로운 경험이야.

turns.question: Nice. Speaking of which, did you end up finding a place near the office?
turns.questionKo: 좋네. 그러고 보니, 회사 근처에 집은 구했어?
turns.answer: Yeah, I did -- it's close enough that I can walk most days.
turns.answerKo: 응, 구했어. 거의 매일 걸어올 수 있을 정도로 가까워.

turns.question: Lucky you. It's supposed to get cold and foggy later, so bring a jacket if you head out.
turns.questionKo: 좋겠다. 이따 춥고 안개 낀다니까 나갈 거면 겉옷 챙겨.
turns.answer: Good call, I'll grab one before lunch.

turns.question: By the way, a bunch of us are getting lunch around one -- want to join?
turns.questionKo: 참, 우리 1시쯤 몇 명이 점심 먹으러 가는데, 같이 갈래?
turns.answer: I'd love that, count me in.

turns.question: Perfect. I'll swing by your desk when it's time.
turns.questionKo: 좋아. 시간 되면 자리로 부르러 갈게.
